exemplar.title: How does Elliptic Curve Cryptography secure data transportation over web channels through the discrete logarithm problem, using elliptic curves defined over finite fields?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Elliptic Curve Cryptography secure data transportation over web channels through the discrete logarithm problem, using elliptic curves defined over finite fields?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Topic is communicated accurately with clear purpose and focus, supported by headings, figures, and worked examples
Research question is explicitly stated, focused on ECC over finite fields, and consistently referenced
Methodology is appropriate with a good range of relevant sources and clear evidence of informed selection
weaknesses: Minor digressions into symmetric cryptography interrupt flow
No abstract is provided to summarise aims and scope at the outset
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates accurate and purposeful communication of the topic and a clearly focused research question, supported by a coherent methodology and appropriate source selection. Occasional narrative lapses and lack of an abstract prevent a topâband score, placing this at 5/6.

strengths: Consistently relevant and effective application of algebraic geometry and numberâtheoretic concepts
Accurate and mostly consistent use of subjectâspecific terminology (e.g., abelian group, discriminant, modular inverse)
Worked proofs and numerical examples are correct and illustrate key ideas
weaknesses: Occasional imprecisions in notation (mixing additive/multiplicative symbols)
Minor LaTeX artefacts and minor variable listing errors (e.g., unused variable âcâ)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay shows excellent command of mathematical knowledge applied directly to elliptic curve cryptography, with precise use of terminology. Small notational slips and stray formatting issues prevent full 6/6 but justify a strong 5/6.

strengths: Research draws effectively on reputable mathematical and cryptographic literature, integrating worked examples
Analysis is logically presented with supported conclusions about security strength
Discussion offers a reasoned argument on ECC advantages and quantum threats
weaknesses: No original data generation or comparative experimental analysis
Depth of analysis is moderate, relying on standard results without novel extensions
Evaluation of limitations and parameter choices is descriptive rather than fully critical
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work presents goodâquality research relevant to the question, clear analysis, and structured argumentation. However, the absence of original experimentation and only partial critical evaluation limit it to 8/12 rather than a higher mark.

strengths: Clear, readerâfriendly structure with a formal title page, comprehensive table of contents, and logical chapter progression
Effective integration of figures and equations aiding understanding
Presence of word count, title, bibliography, and pagination
weaknesses: Erratic equation numbering and residual LaTeX artefacts
Some lowâresolution images and lengthy blocks of text reduce readability
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation is competent, with strong structural elements and adequate layout. Inconsistencies in numbering, alignment issues, and minor formatting errors preclude full marks, warranting 3/4.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research question is explicitly stated early on, is specific to ECC over finite fields, and is referenced throughout the exposition (Introduction, Discussion, Conclusion). While broad in the sense that it embraces several sub-topics (ECDH, ECDSA, quantum risk), the essay consistently links back to explaining how ECDLP secures data, so the focus remains coherent and effective.

Analytical sections (group law derivation, finite-field adaptation, complexity remarks) are logically set out and generally justified, giving supported conclusions about security strength. Depth is moderate: proofs rely on standard results without extension, and hardness of ECDLP is asserted rather than critically quantified. Consequently, the strand sits at the lower end of the âclear analysisâ band.

Mathematical terminologyâabelian group, generator, discriminant, scalar multiplication, modular inverseâis used accurately and consistently through most of the text. A few stylistic slips ("smaller point fits into the bigger Î¸", stray LaTeX artefacts) appear, yet do not obstruct meaning; overall usage satisfies the top band expectations.

Figures, equations and citations are integrated with reasonable clarity; a word count, title and bibliography are present, and pagination appears. Nevertheless, equation numbering is inconsistent, a few LaTeX artefacts remain, and some images are low-resolution. Layout is therefore competent but not flawless, meriting the lower end of the top band.

The essay demonstrates solid command of algebraic geometry and number-theoretic ideas: discriminant test, derivation of slopes, cyclic subgroup order, Pollard-Rho complexity. Worked proofs are largely correct and examples are computed accurately. Occasional imprecisions (e.g., mixing additive and multiplicative notation in definitions) curb the excellence slightly but knowledge remains consistently relevant and effectively applied.

The student introduces elliptic curve cryptography with a clear real-world context, explains its mathematical foundations systematically, and continually returns to the central idea of security through the discrete logarithm problem. Headings, figures and worked examples all serve to communicate purpose and focus effectively. Minor lapses in flow (e.g., occasional digressions into symmetric cryptography) prevent a fully seamless narrative, but overall communication is accurate and purposeful.

A formal title page, table of contents, logical chapter progression and consistent heading style give the essay a clear, reader-friendly structure. Mathematical derivations are placed after conceptual groundwork, supporting understanding well. Minor repetition and some lengthy blocks prevent a perfect score but overall structure is sound and appropriate.

Research draws on reputable mathematical and cryptographic literature and integrates multiple worked examples to test ideas, showing more than adequate but not fully exhaustive breadth. All sources clearly relate to the stated question; however, no original data generation or comparative curve analysis is undertaken, so the level reaches âgoodâ rather than âexcellentâ.

The essay offers a reasoned discussion of ECC advantages and quantum threats, but evaluation of limitations, choice of curve parameters, or alternative cryptosystems is brief. Argument structure is coherent yet largely descriptive; critical weighing of sources or methods is limited. Hence performance aligns with a mid-band âpartially critical evaluationâ.

Methodology is appropriate for a mathematics EE: the student selects core algebraic derivations (group law, point addition, double-and-add), embeds illustrative numeric examples both over â and over ð½â, and cites a broad range of cryptography texts and papers. Source use is generally well judged, though no primary data or software experimentation is included, keeping the approach just short of âexemplaryâ.

annotations.comment: Consider adding a brief abstract immediately after the title to summarise aims and scope, improving early clarity of purpose.
The research question is restated verbatim in the Research Question section, reinforcing coherence and focus.
The research question is explicitly stated, specific to ECC over finite fields, and referenced consistently throughout the essay, demonstrating strong focus and coherence.
The inclusion of a precise word count at the start confirms adherence to IB requirements, supporting proper formatting.
The table of contents is comprehensive with clear hierarchical headings, aiding navigation and supporting reader understanding.
Several entries lack corresponding page numbers or show misalignment in the TOC; ensure consistency in pagination formatting.
The introduction effectively establishes context with relevant internet usage statistics, engaging the reader in the problemâs realâworld importance.
The discussion on symmetric cryptography in this section digresses from ECC focus; consider streamlining to maintain direct relevance to the research question.
Break up long sentences in the publicâkey section into shorter phrases to enhance readability and clarity.
The inline formula appears as â2 = x^3 - 5x + 10â within narrative text, disrupting flow; format all math consistently using LaTeX delimiters.
Figure 1.1 is a clear, wellâlabelled selfâmade diagram that effectively aids understanding of elliptic curves geometrically.
The context section could further discuss nonâcryptocurrency applications (e.g., IoT or secure messaging) to demonstrate broader relevance.
Equation (1.2) lists variable âcâ in the quantifier but does not appear in the equation; revise the variable list for mathematical accuracy.
Consider presenting the five groupâaxiom definitions in a compact table rather than paragraph form to improve readability.
The transition from abelian group axioms to finite field properties is logically coherent and enhances conceptual flow.
Subâsection headings for associative and distributive properties lack consistent numbering; apply uniform styling to improve navigation.
The clock analogy vividly illustrates modular arithmeticâs wrapâaround behavior, grounding abstract concepts in a familiar realâworld example.
Equation (7) is unnumbered, unlike other modular equations; adding consistent numbering will aid crossâreferencing.
Include a brief note explaining why a prime modulus is chosen in cryptographic applications to deepen conceptual understanding of security reasons.

The elliptic curve equation and discriminant condition $$y^2 = x^3 + ax + b,
4a^3 + 27b^2 \neq 0$$ are presented accurately and fully.
Introduce the concept of the discriminant with a brief description of its geometric significance before displaying $$\Delta = 4a^3 + 27b^2 = 0$$.
The sentence âTo condition, singular, function further prove this if curve is the aâ is unintelligible; revise for grammatical clarity.
The derivation using derivatives to confirm $$4a^3 + 27b^2 = 0$$ is logically coherent and supports wellâjustified conclusions about curve smoothness.
Include a brief note on why smoothness (no singular points) is essential for the group law on elliptic curves to underline its algebraic importance.
Mentioning the Extended Euclidean Algorithm without outline may confuse readers; add a footnote or brief appendix reference.
